title: The Galloping Devil
writer: Bertha Muzzy Sinclair, William E. Wing
actors: Franklyn Farnum, Genevieve Bert, Bud Osborne
plot: Andy Green, a colorful cowboy, finds work at the Flying U cattle ranch, owned by Chip. Chip's foreman Dunk, who is Elsie Gray's guardian, attempts to force her to sign papers releasing him, but she refuses because he has stolen so...
